'''''SHADIS Magazine'' 18.5''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[April]] of [[1995]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an unlicensed adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called ''[[The Spark Before the Flame]]'', and was written by [[Sean Patrick Fannon]] with illustrations by [[Matt Wilson]] and [[Richard E. Edmond]].
